author: james
text: Reproduced on Chrome and Firefox. Password with & symbol fails consistently.

author: john
text: Root cause identified: input not being sanitized before DB query. Fixing now.

author: fatima
text: This could be a security vulnerability. Escalating priority to Showstopper.

author: john
text: Fix deployed to QA. Used parameterized queries to prevent injection.

author: james
text: QA verified fix. All special characters now work correctly in passwords.

author: john
text: JWT implementation using RS256 algorithm. PR ready for review.

author: rahul
text: Code review comments added. Need to handle token refresh edge case.

author: fatima
text: Security scan flagged this. Sessions remaining active for 2+ hours.

author: chen
text: Elasticsearch cluster set up. Working on autocomplete mapping now.

author: sarah
text: Confirmed on iPhone SE and iPhone 12 mini. Button z-index issue.

author: lisa
text: Updated CSS. Added proper media query breakpoints for small screens.

author: emma
text: Multiple employees reported blank payslips. 15 tickets raised by HR.

author: kumar
text: NPE in PayslipGenerator.java line 142. BankDetails can be null.

author: kumar
text: Fix applied. Added null check and placeholder text for missing bank info.

author: james
text: QA failed: Fix resolves NPE but now shows 'N/A' for bank name which confuses users.

author: john
text: All our ECOM builds have been failing since yesterday morning.

author: mike
text: Jenkins agent has 4GB heap for Node builds. Node 18 needs at least 8GB. Increasing now.

author: james
text: Crash report from Firebase Crashlytics attached. 450 users affected.

author: chen
text: Need to tune Spark executor memory. Currently 2GB per executor.

author: david
text: Also consider partitioning strategy. Current partition count is too low.

author: fatima
text: CRITICAL: Able to extract user table via UNION-based SQL injection on /api/accounts/search

author: john
text: Emergency fix deployed. All queries now use PreparedStatement.

author: fatima
text: Verified fix. Injection no longer possible. Closing.

author: david
text: Initial analysis: 500 tables, 2TB data. DMS can handle but needs careful testing.

author: david
text: On hold waiting for legacy DB access credentials from IT.
